refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using worksite data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with versioning
Update management system for baselines and calibration history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Modular software components: derivation engine, requirements database, and update manager integrated within NGHE solution

potential_sources: Data flow between derivation engine and database
Update manager interacting with database and derivation engine
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected but manageable via well-defined interfaces and modular design.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
High safety criticality requires rigorous validation of derivation algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design with clear interface contracts to minimize coupling and support verification.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Software system responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication for updates and synchronization with external systems

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module for this functionality; high containment, low diffusion
Vehicle module has minimal containment; would cause high diffusion if assigned here
Not relevant for performance requirement derivation
Safety Services may consume performance data but not responsible for derivation

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirement derivation and management within NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and update history.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution if not properly modularized
Interface dependencies on Telemetry and Network Link must be robust to avoid data loss
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Modularize NGHE Solution internally to separate derivation, recording, and update management; ensure interface robustness.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk by centralizing in NGHE Solution module
Interface dependencies are well-defined and limited
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution software artifacts.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and IM with explicit interfaces supports ownership and verification.

recommended_revisions: Further decompose NGHE Solution internally for maintainability
Define detailed interface protocols for Telemetry and Network Link

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets requirements, constraints, and architectural clarity with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To modularize NGHE Solution internally for better maintainability and risk mitigation

assumptions: Worksite mission data is accurate and timely
Interfaces Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link are reliable
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability and history maintenance in NGHE Solution
Validation of derivation algorithms under safety critical conditions
